{{Infobox character
| name = Feiora Torannus (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Overlord Feiora wears a dark leather breastplate and hardened leather on her shins and forearms.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora is an Overlord who has a raven.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora has a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora finished a discussion with [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora can open a Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora can summon a spear.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora has a raven named [[Eugan]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora is someone [[Lycus]] wants to get back to and help.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
